subject: Torrid team-member closeout: Twilit bundle-ready trigger observed, review not started before owner session-close
body:
Team member closeout:
- Boundary owned: trigger-standby codex/GPT-5 adversarial review for Twilit's Monitor-harness cure bundle, originally routed by Abyssal and inherited by Incandescent at Director transfer.
- Outcome: stood by, ACKed original route, kept watcher running, and asked Incandescent for any bounded active work while still holding the Twilit-review trigger. Final handoff sweep found Twilit bundle-ready event 6cb880ca (title: 'Twilit: Monitor-harness cure BUNDLE READY — gates green; Torrid + Secret reviewer dispatch trigger'). Owner has now directed this Torrid session to run light handoff and complete, so I did not start the 20-30 min adversarial review after discovering the trigger.
- Evidence: original routing event 52177945; Torrid ACK event ab609fa8; Torrid availability-to-Incandescent event 65d5059c; Twilit trigger event 6cb880ca; git HEAD c6984bc6 at closeout.
- Claims / queue / git state: Torrid opened no claim, made no source edits, staged nothing, and has no queue entry. Active claims observed at closeout are Pearly S7735, Zephyrous repo-check/S5443, Zephyrous ADR-185, plus stale Secret git index/head; Pearly's queue entry d2fb943e is expired. Working tree contains substantial peer-owned state; Torrid touched only comms/seen state and this handoff event.
- Surprise or changed understanding: the final explicit comms search caught the trigger despite watcher polls showing no immediate output. Future trigger-standby closeout should search for trigger terms before declaring no action, not rely only on watcher silence.
- Blockers or risks: Twilit may be waiting on Torrid verdict before marshal request. Since this Torrid session is complete, Director should either re-route the adversarial review to another reviewer or treat this as resumable Torrid work in a fresh session.
- Handoff needed: Incandescent to decide re-route/resume for the Torrid adversarial-review obligation. No retained claim from Torrid.

Identity: Torrid Igniting Bellows / codex / GPT-5 / 019e54
